model_specification_line: Weighted Least Squares (WLS) with person weights: fulltime = b0 + b1*daca_eligible + b2*post + b3*daca_eligible*post
outcome_definition: fulltime = 1 if uhrswork >= 35 else 0 (employed 35+ hours per week)
sample_selection: birthyr between 1968 and 1996 (age constraints for DACA eligibility)
uhrswork > 0 and uhrswork <= 99 (non-missing, valid hours worked)
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = 1 if (birthyr > 1981 AND bpl == 200 AND citizen in [3, 5] AND yrimmig <= 2007) else 0
